title: Fig. 7 in Protozoal encephalitis associated with Sarcocystis calchasi and S. falcatula during an epizootic involving Brandt's cormorants (Phalacrocorax penicillatus) in coastal Southern California, USA
author: Bamac, Ozge Erdogan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 7. Gel electrophoresis of the 28S PCR on the brain (B) and muscle (M) tissues from eight Brandt's cormorants submitted from Coastal Southern California. All eight birds demonstrate a band positive for sarcocystis species. C3 is brain from a pigeon with S. calchasi used as control tissue and SN is the S. neurona positive control.
steps_raw: Fig. 7. Gel electrophoresis of the 28S PCR on the brain (B) and muscle (M) tissues from eight Brandt's cormorants submitted from Coastal Southern California. All eight birds demonstrate a band positive for sarcocystis species. C3 is brain from a pigeon with S. calchasi used as control tissue and SN is the S. neurona positive control.
